description: Scaffolding at +6m level missing toe boards on east side; workers observed working near edge without toe boards
immediate_action_taken: Work stopped on east scaffold; toe boards installed within 2 hours
corrective_action: Scaffold inspection checklist updated; daily pre-use inspection mandatory

description: 2 welders observed without welding shields during gas cutting operation; using only tinted glasses
immediate_action_taken: Workers counselled and issued welding shields; verbal warning given
corrective_action: Mandatory PPE check before shift start; 3-strike policy reminder issued to all workers

description: Excavation depth 2.5m without shoring on north face; soil appears loose/sandy; workers inside trench
immediate_action_taken: All workers evacuated from trench immediately; temporary shoring installed; excavation permit re-reviewed
corrective_action: Geotechnical assessment of trench walls; permanent shoring design to be approved before work resumes

description: Excellent adherence to lifting plan during drum placement; tag lines properly used; exclusion zone well maintained; all personnel in full PPE
immediate_action_taken: Positive recognition given to crane operator and rigging team
corrective_action: Share as best practice example in next safety toolbox talk

description: Scattered pipe fittings and welding rod stubs creating tripping hazard in walkway between storage areas
immediate_action_taken: Area cleaned up; temporary barricading placed around storage zones
corrective_action: Implement 5S system for material storage area; weekly housekeeping audit

description: Temporary power cable running across floor near ESP field — cable not protected; wet floor from rain water ingress
immediate_action_taken: Power isolated; cable rerouted through overhead cable tray; water pumped out
corrective_action: Install permanent cable routing before power restoration; fix roof leak in erection bay

description: Small wrench (500g) dropped from +4m platform during tube bundle work; landed 1m from worker below
immediate_action_taken: Work suspended for 30 min; all tools secured with lanyards; tool audit conducted
corrective_action: Mandatory tool tethering for all elevated work; drop zone barricading below work platforms
